description: TransitFeeds.com now redirects to Mobility Database, an open catalog of public transit and mobility data feeds such as GTFS, GTFS Realtime, and GBFS. The transitfeeds.com site serves feed discovery and related transit-data resources.
summary: transitfeeds.com exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the legacy TransitFeeds REST API at `https://api.transitfeeds.com/v1`, authenticated by a personal API key in the `key` query parameter.
